prestazioni: Audi-sourced **TFSI EA888 Gen 3 (CJXC 2.0L)** engine upgraded with a **Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger** (1.05 A/R turbine housing, billet compressor wheel) paired with a **Precision Turbo & Engine 46mm wastegate** for 450+ HP at 2.2 bar boost, utilizing **Mahle Motorsport forged pistons (9.5:1 CR)** and **Manley H-beam connecting rods** with ARP2000 rod bolts

**AP Racing CP8450-400 6-piston front brake calipers** with **380mm two-piece floating rotors (PFC 08 carbon-metallic pads)** and a **Brembo GT 4-piston rear brake kit (355mm rotors)** for GT4-spec stopping power, complemented by **Motul RBF 660 brake fluid**

**KW Competition 3-way adjustable coilovers (GT4-specific valving)** with **Eibach ERS 1000N/mm helper springs** and **Spherical bearing top mounts (uniball)** for sub-200mm ride height adjustability, paired with **H&R 25mm front / 20mm rear anti-roll bars** and **Öhlins TTX-40 dampers (GT4 homologated)**
estetica: **KTM Motorsport GT4 carbon fiber front splitter (3D-scanned for FIA compliance)** with **integrated Gurney flap (adjustable +15mm)** and **Vortex Generators** for 120kg+ front downforce at 200km/h

**Rear diffuser by KTM Racing (GT4-spec carbon fiber)** with **3x active vortex strakes** and **central exhaust exit (Akrapović titanium 100mm dual-tip)** for 180kg+ rear downforce, paired with **KTM Motorsport GT4 rear wing (3-position adjustable, 1.2m span)**

**OMP GT4-spec carbon fiber racing seats (FIA 8862-2009 certified)** with **Schroth 6-point harnesses (ASM2 model)** and **KTM Motorsport carbon fiber door cards (GT4 homologated)** featuring **quick-release door handles (Sabelt)** and **fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360 3.0L extinguisher)**
